name: calendar-lifecycle-consumer
description: Calendar_Lifecycle_Consumer — scheduling §14.2 calendar-as-SoR reconciliation consumer. Second SQS consumer of the typed booking.* events the Calendar_Watch_Listener (B2) dispatches. Owns four event types: booking.calendar_deleted (cancel + TODO(Y) reschedule-link notice), booking.calendar_moved (v1: cancel + self-anchor rescheduleOfBookingId, NO auto-rebook, TODO(Y) reschedule path), booking.calendar_reassigned (repoint resource_id/coordinator_email, NO notify per agent-of-CoR §5.1), booking.event_made_private (channels-table status degrade + admin alert). All other event types are logged and discarded (the sibling Calendar_Event_Consumer owns them). Idempotency via conditional Booking/channels writes (no separate dedupe table). Volunteer-notify dispatch is stubbed TODO(Y) (WS-SCHED-FOUNDATIONS). Consumes the frozen shared/booking-status SoT; never modifies it.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
